---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as documented
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of the bug.

## To reproduce
Minimal code to reproduce:
```python
from scraperx import ...
# ...
```

## Expected behavior
What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behavior
What actually happened? Include full traceback if applicable.

## Environment
- scraperx version: (run `pip show scraperx | grep Version`)
- Python version: (run `python --version`)
- OS: (Linux / macOS / Windows + version)
- Optional extras installed: (e.g., `[vision]`, `[whisper]`)

## Additional context
Any other info — upstream API changes, network conditions, etc.
